title: Homepage Direction
instructions: Please compare the homepage directions, leave notes, and select the strongest direction.

options.title: Main option
options.description: A calm, premium homepage concept for the launch.

assets.title: Homepage desktop
assets.description: A polished desktop hero with rich whitespace and a clear CTA.
assets.notes: The hierarchy feels calm and premium.

assets.title: Homepage mobile
assets.description: A compact mobile experience with a stronger proof stack.
assets.notes: Good rhythm and strong product storytelling.

assets.title: Logo horizontal
assets.description: A wide lockup for the header and hero area.

assets.title: Brand page preview
assets.description: A faux PDF page set for the supporting brand story.
assets.notes: The page flow is easy to skim.

comments.text: The hero section feels confident without being loud.
comments.author: Mina

comments.text: The supporting page feels a little too dense.
comments.author: Jules
